name: AutoGrade AI - Gemini AI Agent Grading

nodes.name: Extract Rubric and Answer Key Text

options.systemMessage: Anda adalah AI grading assistant untuk dosen. ATURAN MUTLAK: 1) Output HARUS berupa SATU object JSON valid — tanpa markdown, tanpa code fence, tanpa backtick, tanpa teks sebelum/sesudah JSON. 2) Gunakan RUBRIK YANG DISEDIAKAN sebagai acuan penilaian. rubric_breakdown HARUS mengikuti rubric_point yang ada di rubrik, BUKAN rubrik karangan sendiri. 3) score HARUS menggunakan skala max_score yang diberikan. Jangan pakai skala sendiri. Jika max_score=100 maka score 0-100. 4) Jika rubrik punya 6 poin, rubric_breakdown juga HARUS punya 6 item yang sesuai. 5) Nilai berdasarkan rubrik, kunci jawaban, soal, dan jawaban mahasiswa yang diberikan. Jangan mengarang fakta. 6) Jika extraction_status bukan SUCCESS, set needs_review true dan confidence LOW/MEDIUM. 7) rubric_breakdown harus array of {rubric_point, score, max_score, feedback}. 8) Feedback email dalam bahasa Indonesia, sopan, spesifik, maksimal 4 kalimat, tidak menyebut sistem internal. 9) Response dimulai dengan { dan diakhiri dengan }.

parameters.jsCode:
const result = $json;
const score = Number(result.score);
const maxScore = Number(result.max_score ?? 100);
const extractedLength = Number(result.extracted_text_length ?? 0);

const canApprove = Boolean(result.auto_approval)
  && result.confidence === 'HIGH'
  && !result.needs_review
  && Number.isFinite(score)
  && score >= 0
  && score <= maxScore
  && result.extraction_status === 'SUCCESS'
  && extractedLength >= Number(result.min_answer_length ?? 30)
  && Boolean(result.output_json_valid);

const status = result.extraction_status === 'FAILED'
  ? 'FAILED'
  : (canApprove ? 'APPROVED' : 'REVIEW');

const emailShouldSend = status === 'APPROVED'
  && Boolean(result.auto_email)
  && Boolean(String(result.student_email ?? '').trim())
  && Boolean(String(result.feedback_email ?? '').trim());

return [{
  json: {
    assignment_id: result.assignment_id,
    assignment_title: result.assignment_title,
    student_id: result.student_id,
    student_name: result.student_name,
    student_email: result.student_email,
    score: result.score,
    score_ai: result.score,
    max_score: maxScore,
    confidence: result.confidence,
    needs_review: result.needs_review,
    status,
    extraction_status: result.extraction_status,
    extracted_text_length: result.extracted_text_length,
    output_json_valid: result.output_json_valid,
    reason: result.reason,
    feedback_email: result.feedback_email,
    rubric_breakdown: result.rubric_breakdown,
    auto_email: Boolean(result.auto_email),
    email_should_send: emailShouldSend,
    email_sent: false,
    gmail_message_id: null,
    extraction_notes: result.extraction_notes ?? [],
    answer_attachment_count: result.answer_attachment_count ?? 0,
    skipped_empty_submissions: Number(result.skipped_empty_submissions ?? 0),
    workflow_version: result.workflow_version ?? 'submitted-work-filter-v2',
    rubric_text_available: Boolean(result.rubric_text_available),
    answer_key_text_available: Boolean(result.answer_key_text_available)
  }
}];

main.node: Extract Rubric and Answer Key Text
